name: ASUS TUF GAMING B760M-PLUS WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5- 7200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax
